title: DevSecOps Engineer
description: Design and maintain secure CI/CD pipelines with integrated security controls. Implement infrastructure-as-code with hardened configurations and automated vulnerability scanning across the development lifecycle.
requirements: 4+ years in DevOps with strong security focus
Expertise in container security (Docker, Kubernetes) and orchestration hardening
Proficiency with IaC tools (Terraform, Ansible) and security automation
Experience implementing SAST, DAST, and SCA in pipelines
Strong scripting skills (Python, Bash) and cloud platform knowledge

title: Malware Analyst
description: Reverse engineer malicious software to understand capabilities, attribution, and indicators of compromise. Develop detection signatures and contribute to threat intelligence products for client defense.
requirements: 4+ years in malware analysis or reverse engineering
Expert proficiency with IDA Pro, Ghidra, and debugging tools
Strong understanding of Windows internals and PE format
Experience with dynamic analysis sandboxes and behavioral analysis
Assembly language fluency (x86/x64) and C/C++ reading ability

title: Threat Intelligence Analyst
description: Track adversary groups, campaigns, and TTPs to produce actionable intelligence. Monitor underground forums, analyze attack infrastructure, and develop early warning indicators for emerging threats.
requirements: 3+ years in threat intelligence or cyber analysis
Experience with OSINT techniques and dark web research
Proficiency with MITRE ATT&CK framework and threat modeling
Strong analytical writing and briefing skills
Background in intelligence analysis or security operations

title: Application Security Engineer
description: Identify and remediate vulnerabilities in web and mobile applications through code review and security testing. Guide development teams on secure coding practices and integrate security into the SDLC.
requirements: 4+ years in application security or secure development
Deep knowledge of OWASP Top 10 and common vulnerability classes
Proficiency in multiple programming languages for code review
Experience with SAST/DAST tools and secure code review methodologies
Strong communication skills for developer engagement

title: QA Engineer
description: Ensure software quality through comprehensive testing strategies including manual and automated testing. Develop test plans, identify defects, and collaborate with development teams to deliver reliable, secure products.
requirements: 4+ years in software quality assurance or testing
Experience with test automation frameworks (Selenium, Cypress, Playwright)
Strong knowledge of testing methodologies and SDLC processes
Proficiency in writing test cases and bug reports
Experience with CI/CD integration and security testing practices

title: Systems Security Developer
description: Build low-level security tools, kernel modules, and high-performance defensive systems. Develop custom implant detection, memory forensics tools, and secure system components requiring deep OS knowledge.
requirements: 5+ years systems programming experience
Expert proficiency in C, C++, and Rust for security-critical code
Strong knowledge of Windows/Linux kernel internals and APIs
Experience with memory management, concurrency, and exploit mitigations
C# proficiency for Windows tooling and .NET security analysis

title: Android Developer
description: Design and develop high-quality Android applications with focus on performance, security, and user experience. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define, design, and ship new features while maintaining code quality and best practices.
requirements: 4+ years of professional Android development experience
Expert proficiency in Kotlin and Java for Android
Strong knowledge of Android SDK, Jetpack components, and Material Design
Experience with RESTful APIs, offline storage, and background processing
Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and secure coding practices

title: macOS Developer
description: Design and develop high-quality macOS applications with focus on performance, security, and native user experience. Leverage Apple frameworks and modern Swift development to build robust desktop solutions that integrate seamlessly with the macOS ecosystem.
requirements: 4+ years of professional macOS development experience
Expert proficiency in Swift and Objective-C
Strong knowledge of AppKit, SwiftUI, and Cocoa frameworks
Experience with Core Data, networking, and system-level APIs
Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines, code signing, and App Store distribution

title: AI & LLM Engineer
description: Design, develop, and deploy advanced AI systems and large language model solutions. Fine-tune and optimize LLMs for domain-specific applications, build RAG pipelines, and integrate AI capabilities into production systems with a focus on performance, reliability, and security.
requirements: 3+ years of experience in machine learning or AI engineering
Deep expertise in LLM architectures, fine-tuning, and prompt engineering
Proficiency in Python and ML frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow, Hugging Face)
Experience with RAG systems, vector databases, and embedding models
Strong understanding of AI security, model evaluation, and responsible AI practices
